videos.headline: C.J. Ogbonna launches 40-yard TD in opening drive
videos.description: C.J. Ogbonna connects with JJ Jenkins on a 40-yard touchdown pass putting Buffalo on the board against Massachusetts

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play ( C.J. Ogbonna launches 40-yard TD in opening drive) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: C.J. Ogbonna sneaks through for 8-yard TD run
